meta.title: US Top 20 Metro Cleaning Company Candidates
meta.purpose: Discovery list for later contact enrichment into outreach mail-merge CSVs
meta.scope: US only — Census Vintage 2024 Top 20 MSAs by population
meta.segment: Residential and commercial cleaning; owner-operated preferred
meta.franchise_policy: Exclude national corporate-only brands; keep local franchise operators who can choose their own operating systems
how_to_use: 1. Pick a metro_id from metro_progress where enrichment is still pending
2. Enrich each candidate (owner, email, phone) — never invent contacts
4. Mark enrichment_status and update metro_progress enrichment notes
5. Always exclude prior CSVs + this file already-enriched rows
